title: fix(workflows): propagate logger to executionEngine

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix: propagate workflow step errors to configured Mastra logger
similarOrDuplicatePRs.overlap: Fixes the same root cause: ExecutionEngine.__registerMastra now calls this.__setLogger(logger), propagating logger to the execution engine. Also fixes evented engine logger propagation.

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(core): update workflow loggers in setLogger
similarOrDuplicatePRs.overlap: Fixes mastra.setLogger() to propagate logger to all workflows, calling __setLogger on each workflow.

summary: Community PR that overrides __setLogger() in the Workflow class to propagate the logger to executionEngine, and adds __registerPrimitives logger propagation. Includes 3 well-written tests. However, two subsequent PRs (#12834 merged 2026-02-09 and #12889 merged 2026-02-10) already fixed this same issue more comprehensively: #12834 made ExecutionEngine.__registerMastra() call __setLogger(logger) automatically, and #12889 ensured mastra.setLogger() propagates to all workflows. The current codebase already has these fixes in place.
maintainerNotes: This PR is superseded by #12834 and #12889 which were merged 10-11 days after this PR was opened. The fix approach in #12834 is more robust — it propagates the logger in ExecutionEngine.__registerMastra() itself rather than requiring an override in Workflow.__setLogger(). Should be closed with a thank-you to the contributor for identifying the issue. The CI checks are stuck in PENDING and will likely conflict with the already-merged changes.
